description: India-first product intelligence and trust platform — full database ERD

public.description: Products, marketplaces, listings, reviews, deals, pricing, search, scraping

users.description: Accounts, auth, payments, notifications, wishlists, rewards, TCO profiles

email_intel.description: Inbox emails, parsed orders, refunds, return windows, subscriptions

tco.description: Total Cost of Ownership models and city reference data

admin.description: Audit logs, moderation queue, scraper runs, site config

User.description: Primary user identity. Custom auth model (email-based, no username). Supports role hierarchy and subscription tiers.

fields.name: has_whydud_email
fields.description: Whether user has activated a @whyd.* shopping email

fields.name: referral_code
fields.description: Auto-generated invite code for referral program

fields.name: is_staff
fields.description: Django auth: can access admin site

WhydudEmail.description: Shopping email addresses under @whyd.in / @whyd.click / @whyd.shop. Users register these on marketplaces to enable purchase tracking.

fields.name: username
fields.description: Local part of the email (e.g. ravi in ravi@whyd.in)

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether this email is actively receiving mail

fields.name: total_orders_detected
fields.description: Running counter of parsed purchase orders

fields.name: onboarding_complete
fields.description: Whether user has completed marketplace registration guide

fields.name: marketplaces_registered
fields.description: List of marketplace slugs where this email is registered

OAuthConnection.description: OAuth2 tokens for external services (currently Google/Gmail). Tokens encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.

PaymentMethod.description: Card vault storing bank/card metadata for payment optimization. NO card numbers, CVV, or expiry stored.
PaymentMethod.security_note: NEVER stores card number, CVV, or expiry. Metadata only.

ReservedUsername.description: Seeded list of usernames blocked from registration as shopping emails.

NotificationPreference.description: Per-user channel toggles for each notification type.

MarketplacePreference.description: User's preferred marketplaces for default filtering.

PurchasePreference.description: Per-category buying preferences for personalized recommendations.

fields.name: affiliate_param
fields.description: URL parameter name for affiliate (e.g. tag for Amazon)

Category.description: Hierarchical product taxonomy. Self-referential tree with optional TCO model.

fields.name: spec_schema
fields.description: JSON Schema defining expected product specs

fields.name: has_tco_model
fields.description: Whether TCO calculator exists for this category

Brand.description: Product brand registry. Supports aliases for fuzzy matching across marketplaces.

fields.name: verified
fields.description: Whether brand identity has been manually verified

Product.description: Canonical product entity aggregated across all marketplace listings. Central node in the data model.

fields.name: avg_rating
fields.description: Weighted average rating across all listings

fields.name: total_reviews
fields.description: Total review count across all listings

fields.name: current_best_marketplace
fields.description: Marketplace slug with current best price

fields.name: marketplace
fields.description: Which marketplace this seller operates on

ProductListing.description: A specific product listed on a specific marketplace by a specific seller.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Listing title as shown on marketplace

fields.name: match_method
fields.description: How matching was done (e.g. ean, title_similarity)

BankCard.description: Reference data for Indian bank debit/credit cards. Used to match offers to user payment methods.

CompareSession.description: Tracks products a user is actively comparing.

fields.name: session_id
fields.description: Browser session ID for anonymous users

fields.name: product_ids
fields.description: Array of product UUIDs being compared

RecentlyViewed.description: Recently viewed products for browsing history.

CategoryPreferenceSchema.description: JSON schema defining the recommendation questionnaire for a product category.

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether this schema is in use

PriceSnapshot.description: TimescaleDB hypertable. Time-series price data — one row per scrape cycle per listing.

MarketplaceOffer.description: Bank/card/wallet offers scraped from marketplace pages for smart payment optimization.

fields.name: emi_tenures
fields.description: Available EMI tenure options in months

ClickEvent.description: Affiliate click tracking for attribution and analytics.

BackfillProduct.description: Staging table for multi-phase price history backfill.

Review.description: Product reviews — scraped from marketplaces and written natively on Whydud.

DudScoreConfig.description: Versioned weight configuration for DudScore algorithm. Only one active config at a time.

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether this is the live config

DudScoreHistory.description: TimescaleDB hypertable for DudScore evolution over time.

BrandTrustScore.description: Aggregated brand-level trust metric. Recomputed weekly.

InboxEmail.description: User's shopping emails. Body content encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.

EmailSource.description: All email sources connected by a user.

ReturnWindow.description: Tracks return eligibility and sends alerts.

DetectedSubscription.description: Recurring subscriptions detected from email patterns.

Wishlist.description: User's product wishlists with optional public sharing.

WishlistItem.description: Product in a wishlist with price tracking.

Deal.description: Automatically detected deals based on price analysis.

RewardPointsLedger.description: Immutable ledger of all points transactions.

GiftCardCatalog.description: Available gift card brands for redemption.

DiscussionReply.description: Replies to discussion threads. Supports nesting.

DiscussionVote.description: Polymorphic voting for threads and replies.

TCOModel.description: Defines TCO calculation model for a product category.

CityReferenceData.description: Indian city-level reference data for TCO calculations.

SearchLog.description: Anonymized search analytics (Meilisearch handles actual search).

AuditLog.description: Immutable record of every admin/moderator action.

ScraperRun.description: Aggregated scraper execution records for admin dashboard.

hypertables.purpose: Price tracking per listing per scrape cycle
